title: Mines
tagline: Reveal safe tiles to climb the multiplier; one mine ends it.
mechanic: M mines hide on a 5×5 grid. Each safe reveal raises the multiplier to the fair value RTP ÷ P(survived so far). Cash out (CLOSE) any time; hit a mine and you lose the lot. EV at every cash-out point is exactly RTP.
showcases: JSON round-state via the json Lua extension

params.name: mines
params.note: more mines → steeper climb, higher variance

mathTest: EV is independent of when you cash out, so `--compare` across cash-out depths stays flat at RTP — and the built-in simulator (which cashes after one tile) already measures it.
